title: Hot Pink Satin Ribbon 10mm, 22M Solid Colors Fabric Hot Pink Ribbon for Crafting, Gift Wrapping, Balloons, DIY Sewing Project, Hair Bows, Xmas, Valentine, Presents Bouquets Floral Wedding & Cake Décor
features: 【Package Includes】 1 roll hot pink ribbon in the package. We have red, wine red, pink, rose, gold, silver grey, white, purple, army blue, light blue, rose gold, yellow, orange, dark green, fluorescent green, black, beige, army green, brown coffee, peacock blue, bean pink, 20+ colors, choice the right color to decoration your party.
【Multicolored Satin Ribbon Size】 10 mm in width, 22meters in length per roll, you can use scissors to cut the ribbon to the length you need; long ribbon, enough for balloons decor and gift wrapping.

【Material】Made of durable polyester fabric, smooth and comfortable texture soft to touch,non-toxic and will not fade easily, can provide you a long-lasting use. bright and colorful, with a sense of shine, an enhance an added festive atmosphere. These are BPA-free and totally safe to use. Bring some decorative flair to any celebration with the help of our Fabric Thick Ribbon and make any party or present more elegant and festive.

【Wide Usage】You can apply the hot pink ribbon for wrapping presents, Champagne, Bouquet, making bows, costume making, cake decoration, scrapbooking/handbook, floral design, art craft and decoration Christmas craft, present wrapping, packaging design, Christmas tree, clothing, hair bows,hair accessories, card making, party favor, hair bow, sewing, floral projects and decorating balloon.

【Simple to Use】Smooth surface without wrinkles, no ironing required before use, can be cut at will. Suit for celebrating Christmas, birthday, wedding, graduation, Halloween, baby shower, bride to be party, bachelor party, Easter, Thanksgiving Party, Gender Reveal Party, Family Gatherings, Show, Exhibition, etc. Add a sense of atmosphere to your parties, celebrations, gatherings, events, etc.and more.
